mapper.select: SELECT os.id, os.operator_id, oi.operator_name, os.data_month, os.technology, os.nr_physical_cell_num, os.lte_physical_cell_num, os.lte_physical_site_num, os.nr_physical_site_num, os.total_site_num, os.total_cell_num, os.online_users, os.nr_users, os.terminal_penetration_ratio, os.lte_avg_dl_rate, os.lte_avg_ul_rate, os.lte_avg_dl_prb, os.lte_avg_ul_prb, os.nr_avg_dl_rate, os.nr_avg_ul_rate, os.nr_avg_dl_prb, os.nr_avg_ul_prb, os.traffic_ratio, os.duration_campratio, os.fallback_ratio FROM operator_summary os JOIN operator_info oi ON os.operator_id = oi.id WHERE os.data_month = ( SELECT MAX(os2.data_month) FROM operator_summary os2 WHERE os2.operator_id = os.operator_id ) ORDER BY os.operator_id

SELECT os.id, os.operator_id, oi.operator_name, os.data_month, os.technology, os.nr_physical_cell_num, os.lte_physical_cell_num, os.lte_physical_site_num, os.nr_physical_site_num, os.total_site_num, os.total_cell_num, os.online_users, os.nr_users, os.terminal_penetration_ratio, os.lte_avg_dl_rate, os.lte_avg_ul_rate, os.lte_avg_dl_prb, os.lte_avg_ul_prb, os.nr_avg_dl_rate, os.nr_avg_ul_rate, os.nr_avg_dl_prb, os.nr_avg_ul_prb, os.traffic_ratio, os.duration_campratio, os.fallback_ratio FROM operator_summary os JOIN operator_info oi ON os.operator_id = oi.id WHERE os.data_month = ( SELECT MAX(os2.data_month) FROM operator_summary os2 WHERE os2.operator_id = os.operator_id AND os2.technology = os.technology ) ORDER BY os.operator_id, os.technology

SELECT os.id, os.operator_id, oi.operator_name, os.data_month, os.technology, os.nr_physical_cell_num, os.lte_physical_cell_num, os.lte_physical_site_num, os.nr_physical_site_num, os.total_site_num, os.total_cell_num, os.online_users, os.nr_users, os.terminal_penetration_ratio, os.lte_avg_dl_rate, os.lte_avg_ul_rate, os.lte_avg_dl_prb, os.lte_avg_ul_prb, os.nr_avg_dl_rate, os.nr_avg_ul_rate, os.nr_avg_dl_prb, os.nr_avg_ul_prb, os.traffic_ratio, os.duration_campratio, os.fallback_ratio FROM operator_summary os JOIN operator_info oi ON os.operator_id = oi.id WHERE os.operator_id = #{operatorId} AND os.technology = 'ALL' AND os.data_month = ( SELECT MAX(os2.data_month) FROM operator_summary os2 WHERE os2.operator_id = os.operator_id AND os2.technology = 'ALL' )

SELECT os.id, os.operator_id, oi.operator_name, os.data_month, os.technology, os.nr_physical_cell_num, os.lte_physical_cell_num, os.lte_physical_site_num, os.nr_physical_site_num, os.total_site_num, os.total_cell_num, os.online_users, os.nr_users, os.terminal_penetration_ratio, os.lte_avg_dl_rate, os.lte_avg_ul_rate, os.lte_avg_dl_prb, os.lte_avg_ul_prb, os.nr_avg_dl_rate, os.nr_avg_ul_rate, os.nr_avg_dl_prb, os.nr_avg_ul_prb, os.traffic_ratio, os.duration_campratio, os.fallback_ratio FROM operator_summary os JOIN operator_info oi ON os.operator_id = oi.id WHERE os.operator_id = #{operatorId} AND os.technology = 'ALL' ORDER BY os.data_month DESC

SELECT os.id, os.operator_id, oi.operator_name, os.data_month, os.technology, os.nr_physical_cell_num, os.lte_physical_cell_num, os.lte_physical_site_num, os.nr_physical_site_num, os.total_site_num, os.total_cell_num, os.online_users, os.nr_users, os.terminal_penetration_ratio, os.lte_avg_dl_rate, os.lte_avg_ul_rate, os.lte_avg_dl_prb, os.lte_avg_ul_prb, os.nr_avg_dl_rate, os.nr_avg_ul_rate, os.nr_avg_dl_prb, os.nr_avg_ul_prb, os.traffic_ratio, os.duration_campratio, os.fallback_ratio FROM operator_summary os JOIN operator_info oi ON os.operator_id = oi.id WHERE os.technology = #{technology} AND os.data_month = ( SELECT MAX(os2.data_month) FROM operator_summary os2 WHERE os2.operator_id = os.operator_id AND os2.technology = #{technology} ) ORDER BY os.operator_id
